security.csp: default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https: blob:; media-src 'self' blob: http://127.0.0.1:*; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:*

bundle.shortDescription: Tauri 2 streaming client for the Stremio addon ecosystem.
bundle.longDescription: kino is a multiplatform streaming client (Android, Android TV, Linux) that consumes the Stremio addon ecosystem, embeds librqbit with adaptive piece-deadline buffering, and ships a native player per platform (ExoPlayer on Android, libmpv on Linux). See PRD.md for full details.
